Done. Here is what was changed in `/mnt/data/terminal/graph.html`:

**Edge labels on hover only:**
- `makeEdgeItem` now sets `label: undefined` and stores the real label in `_fullLabel`
- `hoverEdge`/`blurEdge` handlers show/hide the label for the hovered edge
- `hoverNode`/`blurNode` handlers show/hide labels for all edges connected to the hovered node
- Edge-hover and node-hover interact correctly (blurNode won't hide an edge that's still directly hovered)
